game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Stardew Valley Stardew Valley is an open-ended farming and life simulation RPG where players restore a dilapidated farm, engaging in activities like planting crops, raising livestock, fishing, mining, and interacting with townspeople. The game operates on a daily and seasonal cycle affecting gameplay, requiring players to manage energy and health, utilize tools, and craft items, while skill levels (farming, mining, etc.) improve over time, unlocking new recipes and abilities.
game_info.description: Pixel Valley is a simplified farming simulation where you manage a small plot of land. Plant and harvest crops, manage your energy, and earn money to expand your farm. The game cycles through days, and each crop takes time to grow. Your goal is to reach 500 gold by efficiently managing your farm and resources.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character around the farm
Z: Interact (plant seeds, harvest crops, sleep)
SPACE: Switch between tools (hoe, seeds, watering can)
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause the game
R: Restart the game
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Testing basic game functionality and error-free gameplay using random actions to ensure the game runs smoothly.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Perform random movements, tool selections, and interactions across the farm to test all basic mechanics.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game should run without errors, player should be able to move, interact with objects, and game states should transition correctly.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>

<TEST_2>
<test_description>Testing winning condition by efficiently farming to reach 500 gold.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Plant, water, and harvest crops systematically while managing energy to maximize profit per day.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player should be able to reach 500 gold and trigger the win condition within a reasonable number of game days.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>

<TEST_3>
<test_description>Testing energy management system and sleep mechanics.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Deplete energy through farming activities and test the sleep functionality to restore energy.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Energy should decrease with actions, prevent actions when depleted, and be restored after sleeping to start a new day.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>

<TEST_4>
<test_description>Testing crop growth cycle from planting to harvest.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Plant crops and ensure proper watering and growth progression through multiple days.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Crops should progress through growth stages correctly and be harvestable when fully grown.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>

<TEST_5>
<test_description>Testing tool switching and appropriate tool functionality.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Cycle through all tools and attempt to use each in appropriate and inappropriate contexts.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Tools should switch correctly and only perform their intended function in the right context.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
